label: Linear Algebra
shortDescription: A free linear algebra course covering systems, vectors, matrices, determinants, vector spaces, orthogonality, eigenvalues, and symmetric matrices.
modulesDescription: Read the linear algebra chapters in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.
ogTitle: Learn Linear Algebra for Free | CalcPath

topics.title: Systems of Linear Equations
topics.description: Row reduction, Gaussian elimination, and solution types.

topics.title: Vectors and Euclidean Spaces
topics.description: Vector arithmetic, linear combinations, span, and independence.

topics.title: Matrix Algebra
topics.description: Matrix operations, inverses, and characterizations of invertibility.

topics.title: Determinants
topics.description: Cofactor expansion, properties, Cramer's rule, and geometric interpretation.

topics.title: Vector Spaces
topics.description: Subspaces, basis, dimension, rank, and the rank-nullity theorem.

topics.title: Orthogonality and Least Squares
topics.description: Orthogonal projections, Gram-Schmidt process, and least-squares fitting.

topics.title: Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors
topics.description: Characteristic equation, diagonalization, and complex eigenvalues.

topics.title: Symmetric Matrices and Quadratic Forms
topics.description: Spectral theorem, quadratic forms, SVD, and PCA.

topics.title: Linear Transformations
topics.description: Kernel, image, matrix representations, and change of basis.
